response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq and has built and maintained complex systems using Nest.js-like patterns (via Express/Node.js microservices) and testing frameworks including Vitest-equivalent practices (TDD, CI/CD). His open-source GIS platform demonstrates architecture, Docker/Kubernetes deployment, and cross-stack ownership. He has used PostgreSQL/MySQL/MongoDB, Git, and security-aware development. His background includes Java/Kotlin via DLang interop and embedded systems, satisfying secondary stack needs. He has strong communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks. His only potential gaps are limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest (though Node.js + testing practices align), and German language is only basic, though English is fluent and role is in Berlin with global teams. His degree in CS satisfies the education requirement.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven AI-agent infrastructure development and open-source architecture leadership
Strong testing, CI/CD, and DevOps practices with Docker, Kubernetes, and Git
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume (though equivalent Node.js/testing experience exists)
German language proficiency is only basic, may impact local collaboration in Berlin
Some roles involve DLang/C++/Java in niche contexts; TypeScript/React focus is strong but less recent in Java/Kotlin
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds all core requirements with extensive full-stack, cloud, and AI-agent experience, strong testing and architecture skills, and a track record of shipping complex systems. While he lacks explicit Nest.js/Vitest exposure, his Node.js and testing practices are equivalent, and his open-source leadership and communication skills add significant value. The minor language and tooling gaps are outweighed by his depth and adaptability.
